report.summary: Created branded OG images for 2 new learn pages (Fusaka/Glamsterdam, AI Agent Wallets), implemented UX refinements including visible publish dates, accessible TOC focus states, card-style related reading links, and hover-lift interaction polish.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added visible publish date (March 23, 2026) to Fusaka/Glamsterdam guide header badges row
Added keyboard focus ring styles (2px #6366f1 outline) to all Table of Contents links on both pages for WCAG accessibility
Upgraded Fusaka page Related Reading from plain text arrows to interactive card components with title, description, hover border, and hover background transitions
Added hover lift effect (-translate-y-0.5) to AI Agent Wallets Related Guides cards for better interaction feedback
Both pages now use static branded OG SVGs instead of dynamic /api/og route for faster, more reliable social sharing previews

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-ethereum-fusaka-glamsterdam-guide.svg (1200x630) — dark theme, EIP roadmap panel showing PeerDAS/EIP-7825/Glamsterdam/Danksharding, stats row with launch date and EIP count, purple-blue Ethereum gradient

OG image: og-ai-agent-wallets-autonomous-payments-guide.svg (1200x630) — dark theme, platform cards panel showing x402/Alchemy/World/Coinbase, stats row with $3-5T market projection and Fortune 500 adoption, cyan-purple AI gradient

sections.title: Pages Polished
items: /learn/ethereum-fusaka-glamsterdam-guide-2026 — OG image, publish date, TOC focus states, card-style related reading
/learn/ai-agent-wallets-autonomous-payments-guide-2026 — OG image, TOC focus states, hover-lift related guide cards
